sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23030" key="gunaikoi+e/rac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικο-ϊέραξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman-hunter,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
